metadata.title:
NATIONAL FEED &


MILL co. BUILDING
Property Occupied by Pres
ent Site Bought by Mil


Waukee Road.

pages.raw_text:
A warehouse and feed milling
plant, being constructed at Perry
and Riverside avenue by the Ma
tional Feed & Mill company, with
plant now at Sheridan and Front,
is one of the latest additions to the
industrial section of Union Park.
w. A. Stroud, a corpentering con-
tractor from Davenport, Wash. is
in charge of the work and is rush
ing the building to completion in
order that the company may occu-
ply it before the first of April.


The building, which is of wooden
structure, with one story and a
basement, is of peculiar dimen-
sions. having frantage of 80 feet
on Perry street, $50 feet in length
on the south side, fronting River
side avenue, 81 feet across the west
end and 100 feet along the north
end, where it abuts on the North.
ern Pacific railway.


Property on which the National
Feed and Mill company's present
establishment stands has been pur-
chased by. the Chicago, Milwaukee
& st. Paul Railway company. and
the old building is to be torn down
to clear the right of way immedi-
ately after April /. The ground oc-
cupied by the new building is own
ed by C. B. Dennis, and it is stated
that the National Feed and Mill
company has procured 10 year
lease on it.
